response.text:
I built a verified AFG31000 flow that sets CH1 to a 1 kHz sine, 2 Vpp, 50 Ω, and turns the output on.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Replace the empty workspace with a verified AFG31000 setup flow for CH1 sine output at 1 kHz, 2 Vpp, 50 ohm, output on.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Long semicolon command chains were split and grouped for readability (max 3 commands per step).","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"afg1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"AFG31000 CH1 1kHz Sine 2Vpp 50ohm On","description":"Configure AFG31000 channel 1 for a 1 kHz sine wave at 2 Vpp into 50 ohm and enable output.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"AFG","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["afg1"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"id":"g_concat_xgy9mp","type":"group","label":"Set CH1 Waveform and Levels","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"type":"write","label":"Set CH1 Waveform and Levels","params":{"command":"SOURce1:FUNCtion:SHAPe SINusoid"},"id":"s1_2"},{"type":"write","label":"Set CH1 Waveform and Levels","params":{"command":"SOURce1:FREQuency:FIXed 1000"},"id":"cmd_3gc34a"},{"type":"write","label":"Set CH1 Waveform and Levels","params":{"command":"SOURce1:VOLTage:LEVel:IMMediate:AMPLitude 2"},"id":"cmd_njjvmu"},{"type":"write","label":"Set CH1 Waveform and Levels","params":{"command":"OUTPut1:IMPedance 50"},"id":"cmd_v87byg"}]},{"type":"write","label":"Enable CH1 Output","params":{"command":"OUTPut1:STATe ON"},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["afg1"]},"id":"s1_4"}]}}]}
